text:
# Carcavelos Forecast – Friday 17 April

**Clean morning waves with light winds fade as NNW sea breeze builds through the day.**

Morning is your window. 04:00–11:00 delivers consistent 2.1m sets on glassy conditions, with the best light winds holding until 10:00. The swell's still 2+ metres at dawn, so hit it early if you're keen—by 07:00–08:00 you'll have solid, manageable peaks with minimal chop.

Afternoon is softer. Waves slide to 1.7m by lunchtime and keep declining. Wind picks up from the NNW from 16:00 onward, hitting 15km/h by close of day—making conditions choppy and less appealing.

**Get out before 11:00.** Bring a shortboard if you're looking to work the smaller stuff post-lunch. It'll be crowded morning peak, so an early 06:00 dawn patrol session beats the crowds. Water's cold (12°C) at sunrise—gloves worth considering.
